kept.text:
Streeteasy/Zillow has meaningful coverage bias: They rarely list nonmarket housing, ethnic mutual aid network options, & offline old school owner-occupant landlords

But this is still useful data! It shows what's available to people without deep nonmarket neighborhood ties
